PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?governor ?governorLabel(MIN(?startTime) AS ?firstStartTime) WHERE {
  ?governor p:P39 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P39 wd:Q641589 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startTime .
  ?governor rdfs:label ?governorLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?governorLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(?startTime <= "1858-08-02T00:00:00Z" ^^ xsd:dateTime)
}
GROUP BY ?governor ?governorLabel
ORDER BY ASC(?firstStartTime)
LIMIT 1
